CONTENT.Club career: He made his debut in the Russian Premier League for FC Lokomotiv Moscow on 18 July 2017 in a game against FC Arsenal Tula.In late September 2020, he was diagnosed with blood vessels issues and the doctors recommended that he stop playing football for several months and kept under observation. He retired in July 2021 due to heart complications.
CONTENT.Personal life: His younger brother Aleksey Lysov is also a professional football player.
CONTENT.External links: Mikhail Lysov at Russian Premier League

SUMMARY: Mikhail Pavlovich Lysov (Russian: Михаил Павлович Лысов; born 29 January 1998) is a Russian former professional football player who played as a left back.
